bank.retain_mission: Extract HR-onboarding, recruitment, and corporate-training decisions and outcomes.
bank.observations_mission: Observations are stable facts about hiring funnel, onboarding milestones, training catalog, and recurring people-ops pain. Ignore individual candidate details.

mental_models.name: People Funnel
mental_models.source_query: What does the recruiting and onboarding funnel look like? Include stage owners and timelines.

mental_models.name: Training & Development
mental_models.source_query: What training programs and development patterns measurably help? Include catalog and outcomes.
